ucs.title: [LLM] Lazarus 'Operation Dream Job' — ISO/IMG lure mounting to rundll32/LNK execution from removable media
ucs.description: Hunts the recruiter-themed lure chain Lazarus (Diamond Sleet / Labyrinth Chollima) has used against aerospace, defense and cryptocurrency engineers since 2020 (e.g. AmazonVNC.iso, BoeingPDF, Lockheed_job_offer): an ISO/IMG/VHD container delivered through LinkedIn or webmail is mounted by the user, and a LNK posing as a PDF inside the container spawns rundll32/cmd/powershell from the mounted volume to side-load the first-stage implant (BLINDINGCAN, LIDSHIFT, MagicRAT).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_name="*.iso" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.img" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.vhd" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.vhdx") AND Filesystem.action="created" AND Filesystem.process_name IN ("outlook.exe","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","WinRAR.exe","7zG.exe","explorer.exe","OneDrive.exe","Teams.exe") by host Filesystem.user Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | rename host as iso_host user as iso_user | join type=inner iso_host [ | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="explorer.exe" AND Processes.process_name IN ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cmd.exe","powershell.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe") AND (Processes.parent_process="*.lnk*" OR Processes.process="*\\Device\\CdRom*" OR Processes.process="*\\Volume{*" OR Processes.process="*.dll,*" OR Processes.process="*-windowstyle hidden*" OR Processes.process="*-encodedcommand*") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_id _time | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename host as iso_host user as iso_user | rename _time as exec_time ] | where (exec_time-lastTime)>0 AND (exec_time-lastTime)<1800 | table firstTime lastTime exec_time iso_host iso_user file_name file_path parent_process process_name process
ucs.kql: let lure = DeviceFileEvents | where ActionType == "FileCreated" | where FileName endswith ".iso" or FileName endswith ".img" or FileName endswith ".vhd" or FileName endswith ".vhdx" | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("outlook.exe","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","WinRAR.exe","7zG.exe","explorer.exe","OneDrive.exe","Teams.exe") | project IsoTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, IsoPath=FolderPath, IsoName=FileName, DeliveredBy=InitiatingProcessFileName, IsoUser=InitiatingProcessAccountName; let exec = DeviceProcessEvents | where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe" | where FileName in~ ("rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","cmd.exe","powershell.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe") | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (".lnk",".dll,","-w hidden","-windowstyle hidden","-enc","-EncodedCommand","\\Device\\CdRom","\\Volume{") or InitiatingProcessCommandLine has ".lnk" | project ExecTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, ChildProcess=FileName, ChildCmd=ProcessCommandLine, ParentCmd=InitiatingProcessCommandLine, AcctName=AccountName; lure | join kind=inner exec on DeviceId | where ExecTime between (IsoTime .. (IsoTime + 30m)) | project IsoTime, ExecTime, DeviceName, IsoUser, DeliveredBy, IsoName, IsoPath, ChildProcess, ChildCmd, ParentCmd
ucs.rationale: ISO/IMG/VHD containers mark-of-the-web bypass + LNK-launched rundll32 within minutes of mounting is the signature Lazarus Dream Job loader pattern documented by Mandiant (UNC2970), Microsoft (Diamond Sleet) and ESET. Most enterprises do not mount ISOs from email or chat in normal workflow, so the temporal join between an ISO created by a browser/mail/IM client and a LOLBin spawned by explorer from

ucs.title: [LLM] Lazarus trojanized signed-binary side-loading with legitimate-web-service C2 (3CX / X_TRADER / AppleJeus pattern)
ucs.description: Hunts Lazarus's recurring post-exploitation pattern: a legitimately-signed vendor executable (3CXDesktopApp, X_TRADER, UltraVNC, BGInfo, COLORUI, wsmprovhost) executes from a non-standard path and immediately loads a same-folder DLL (ffmpeg.dll, d3dcompiler_47.dll, wsock32.dll, version.dll), which then beacons to a legitimate web service (GitHub raw, Pastebin, Dropbox, Google Drive, OneDrive, ngrok). This is the chain Mandiant (UNC4736), Microsoft (Diamond Sleet) and CrowdStrike (LABYRINTH CHOLLIMA) attribute to the 3CX/X_TRADER cascading supply-chain incident and the AppleJeus crypto trader t
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("3CXDesktopApp.exe","X_TRADER.exe","CelasTradePro.exe","UltraVNC.exe","vncviewer.exe","colorui.exe","BGInfo.exe","wsmprovhost.exe","PerfWatson2.exe","vmnat.exe") AND NOT (Processes.process_path IN ("*\\Program Files\\*","*\\Program Files (x86)\\*","C:\\Windows\\System32\\*")) by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process_path Processes.process_id Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename process_id as suspect_pid host as suspect_host | join type=inner suspect_host suspect_pid [ | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Network_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_port IN (80,443,8080,8443) AND (All_Traffic.app="*github*" OR All_Traffic.app="*pastebin*" OR All_Traffic.app="*dropbox*" OR All_Traffic.app="*googleapi*" OR All_Traffic.app="*googleusercontent*" OR All_Traffic.app="*onedrive*" OR All_Traffic.app="*ngrok*" OR All_Traffic.app="*notion*" OR All_Traffic.app="*slack*" OR All_Traffic.app="*telegram*") by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.process_id All_Traffic.app All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.dest_port | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | rename src as suspect_host process_id as suspect_pid ] | table firstTime lastTime suspect_host user process_name process_path parent_process_name app dest dest_port
ucs.kql: let suspect_procs = dynamic(["3CXDesktopApp.exe","X_TRADER.exe","CelasTradePro.exe","UltraVNC.exe","vncviewer.exe","colorui.exe","BGInfo.exe","wsmprovhost.exe","PerfWatson2.exe","vmnat.exe"]); let trusted_paths = dynamic([@"\Program Files\",@"\Program Files (x86)\",@"C:\Windows\System32\",@"C:\Windows\SysWOW64\"]); let sus = DeviceProcessEvents | where FileName in~ (suspect_procs) | where not(FolderPath has_any (trusted_paths)) | project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, FolderPath, ProcessId, SHA256, ProcessCommandLine, ParentProcess=InitiatingProcessFileName; let sideload = DeviceImageLoadEvents | where FileName in~ ("ffmpeg.dll","d3dcompiler_47.dll","wsock32.dll","version.dll","dbghelp.dll","vcruntime140.dll","libcef.dll","DSROLE.dll") | where not(FolderPath startswith @"C:\Windows\System32") and not(FolderPath startswith @"C:\Windows\SysWOW64") | project LoadTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, LoadedDll=FileName, DllPath=FolderPath, ProcessId=InitiatingProcessId, LoadingProcess=InitiatingProcessFileName; let net = DeviceNetworkEvents | where RemoteUrl has_any ("github.com","raw.githubusercontent.com","pastebin.com","dropboxapi.com","googleapis.com","googleusercontent.com","onedrive.live.com","ngrok.io","notion.so","discord.com/api","telegram.org") | project NetTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, ProcessId=InitiatingProcessId, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, InitiatingProcessFileName; sus | join kind=inner sideload on DeviceId, ProcessId | join kind=inner net on DeviceId, ProcessId | where LoadTime between (Timestamp .. (Timestamp + 10m)) and NetTime between (Timestamp .. (Timestamp + 30m)) | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, FolderPath, LoadedDll, DllPath, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP
ucs.rationale: Triple correlation (signed-but-misplaced trader/admin binary + same-folder DLL with side-loadable name + outbound to a legitimate web-service C2) is the exact tradecraft Lazarus reused across AppleJeus, MagicRAT, the 3CXDesktopApp ffmpeg.dll/d3dcompiler_47.dll cascade and the X_TRADER → 3CX supply-chain pivot. Other actors side-load DLLs, but Lazarus is the cluster that consistently pairs it with
